question_templates.count: How many reviews are labeled '{label}'? Answer with the number only.
question_templates.proportion: What percentage of reviews are labeled '{label}'? Round to the nearest integer, answer with the number only.
question_templates.entity_count: How many reviews about the brand '{entity}' are labeled '{label}'? Answer with the number only.
question_templates.entity_argmax: Which brand received the most '{label}' reviews? Answer with the brand name only.
question_templates.shift: Did the share of '{label}' reviews rise or fall in the second half compared to the first? Answer 'rose' or 'fell'.
question_templates.top_k: Which {k} brands received the most '{label}' reviews? List them from most to fewest, separated by ' > '.
question_templates.pairwise: Which brand has more '{label}' reviews: '{entity_a}' or '{entity_b}'? Answer with the brand name only.
